subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! These are honoured servants and devoted handmaidens who have hastened to the Wellspring of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هولاء عباد مکرمون و اماء قانتات سرعوا الی معین رحمانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
